scripts.dev: concurrently --names "next,api,worker,redis" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run api" "npm run worker" "npm run redis"
scripts.api: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.worker: cd backend && uv run celery -A tasks.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=2
